'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/sitemap-0.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=si8q1PAuVFluNPDH_YCXiMVSgwXL90UEribSo7UyXEc-1773027245-1.0.1.1-U42sQ1_fv_IqfghNdDvP_JbICtpAUS46TQaEcfvANA4"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
